name: Marbled Butterscotch Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and brown sugar in a large mixing bowl.
2. Beat in the egg and vanilla extract.
3. Stir together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Blend into the creamed mixture.
4. Spread the batter evenly in a 2-quart serving dish.
5. Swirl melted chocolate over the top with a knife.
6. Microwave until the top springs back when lightly pressed with your finger (about 8½ to 9 minutes). Rotate or flip the dish once during cooking time.
7. Allow to cool completely.
8. Cut into squares.
